features: 2 in 1 CREAM -- Soothes your baby's skin in a soft and gentle way. Helps to protect against irritated skin and nappy rash.
EVERYDAY USE -- Nappy Rash Cream was formulated for use during the day, night or as baby requires to comfort and moisturise.
GREAT VALUE -- Large pot lasts a long time.
Package contents: 3x200ml Nuage Zinc and Castor Oil Nappy Rash Cream. The actual packaging may vary.
description: Product description If you’re looking for a mild barrier cream to prevent nappy rash, Nuagé Zinc and Castor Oil Cream is a great choice. It moisturises the delicate skin around the nappy area with nourishing skin-loving ingredients, including zinc oxide, vitamin E and castor oil. The thick cream also works well as a protective skin barrier and is gentle enough to use daily. A small amount is enough to experience all the skin-soothing properties. The cream has a pleasant, baby-powder-like scent, relaxing and not overpowering. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of the reach of children.
